title: viola × watsonii
intro: Viola × watsonii, also known as Watson's pansy or hybrid pansy, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the viola genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. The herbal preparations of Viola × watsonii can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
